overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character running through a mountainous landscape with ancient stone ruins at dusk. The character travels along a riverside path, passes through monumental stone gate pillars, and ascends a snowy peak to reach a cliffside overlook above the clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin path along mountain river

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt trail beside the river, approaching the distant stone gate pillars

entered.detail: tall stone pillars with lit braziers marking the entrance to the temple grounds
fast-flowing river running parallel to the path through rocky terrain
steep reddish-brown rock formation rising beside the trail
waterfall cascading down the mountain face visible between the gate pillars

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wide dirt trail carved into the mountainside, with a rushing river on the right and steep cliffs on the left. The path leads toward two massive stone pillars in the distance, silhouetted against a pink and purple dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple gate approach with stone corridor

events.description: passing between the two massive stone gate pillars into the temple approach corridor
ground surface transitions from dirt to snow-covered stone as the temple entrance approaches

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the stone gate corridor toward the mountain temple facade, with snow becoming visible on the ground

entered.detail: massive stone temple structure built into the mountain with intricate carvings
dark arched doorway at the base of the temple structure
colorful banners hanging from the stone pillars fluttering in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character passes between the monumental gate pillars, entering a corridor flanked by stone walls. The massive temple facade looms ahead, built directly into the snow-dusted mountain. Prayer flags flutter from the pillars as the path becomes increasingly snowy approaching the temple entrance.

events.description: character veers left and begins ascending the snowy slope away from the temple entrance
reaching the cliff edge revealing a vast sea of clouds below the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: climbing up the snow-covered rocky slope to reach the mountain overlook, leaving the temple path behind

entered.detail: thick snow covering the rocky terrain and path
dense white cloud sea visible below the cliff edge
weathered stone blocks and broken pillars scattered on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the temple entrance, the character climbs a steep snow-covered slope. Ancient ruins dot the hillside as the path ascends to a rocky overlook. The scene opens to reveal a breathtaking vista of clouds filling the valley below, with distant mountain peaks rising above the cloud sea.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a riverside mountain trail that ascends into a snowy highland overlook above the clouds. It begins with the character running along a wide dirt path between steep cliffs and a rushing river, heading toward two massive stone pillars silhouetted against a pink and purple dusk sky. As the character passes through these monumental gates, the terrain shifts into a stone-walled corridor where prayer flags flutter and the ground becomes increasingly dusted with snow. The scene then transitions from the looming temple facade to a steep, snow-covered climb past ancient hillside ruins. Finally, the camera reaches a rocky overlook, opening up to reveal a breathtaking vista of distant mountain peaks rising above a sea of clouds filling the valley below.
